Package org.solenopsis.soap.tooling

Class ForecastingType

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.Metadata
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.ForecastingType
public class ForecastingType extends Metadata

Java class for ForecastingType complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="ForecastingType">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:metadata.tooling.soap.sforce.com}Metadata">
       <sequence>
         <element name="active" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean"/>
         <element name="amount" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean"/>
         <element name="dateType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="developerName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="hasProductFamily" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean"/>
         <element name="masterLabel" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="opportunitySplitType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="opptyLineItemSplitType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="quantity" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean"/>
         <element name="roleType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="territory2Model" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
